* Defendant made a CCP170.6 challenge to Judge McBride. The Court sustained the challenge. The ruling was later vacated because defendant had already exercised his right to challenge Judge Garcia, order was entered on 1/30/2002.
* The Court ordered transferred defendant Rose R. Hughes' motion for an order vacating and setting aside default judgment to Dept. 206 to be heard by Judge Quidachay.
